name: Strawberries Alberto
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix wine with the sugar and lemon slices in a large bowl until combined.
2. Gently stir in the hulled and sliced strawberries until evenly coated.
3. Cover the mixture and chill for at least 30 minutes before serving.
Note: If the strawberries are very ripe and sweet, you may not need as much sugar.
